items.summary: If you want an iPad that’s more powerful than the entry-level model but less expensive than the iPad Pro, the latest iPad Air is the one to buy, and it’s down to one its best prices to date. items.summary: Telltale SSD activity can be measured in the browser using simple JavaScript.

items.title: France’s startup scene is falling behind the US and Europe, and AI is both the cause and the cure
items.summary: A new report on the French tech ecosystem by Alexandre Dewez, a partner at venture firm 20VC, paints a picture of a startup scene that is growing more dependent on a handful of AI companies while the rest of the market stalls. items.title: Chile’s Atacama desert is becoming the world’s biggest battery farm
items.summary: ContourGlobal, the independent power producer backed by KKR, has inaugurated a nearly $500 million solar-and-storage facility in Chile’s Atacama desert that stores daytime solar energy and delivers it after sundown. items.title: All the news about Ferrari’s polarizing Luce EV
items.summary: Ferrari fans don’t like the design of the new Luce EV, an electric four-door sedan that just doesn’t look like the Ferraris of old. items.title: Spotify and Netflix are paying Jay Shetty up to $100 million to take his podcast off YouTube
items.summary: Jay Shetty, the former Hindu monk turned self-help podcaster, has signed a deal to bring the video version of his show On Purpose exclusively to Spotify and Netflix. items.title: In more good news for Amazon, Snowflake signs $6B deal with AWS for AI CPU chips
items.summary: Snowflake has signed a new, enormous five-year deal with Amazon to secure chips for AI usage. Nvidia is once again being put on notice.

items.summary: After first being announced in December 2024, Lux Optics has finally released the latest version of its Halide camera app for the iPhone and iPad. items.title: Cognition just raised $1 billion at a $26 billion valuation, and 90% of its own code is written by its AI
items.summary: Cognition AI has raised more than $1 billion in new funding at a $26 billion valuation, more than doubling its worth since a September round that valued the company at $10.2 billion. items.title: Dutch police seized 800 servers used by Russian hackers to attack Europe
items.summary: Dutch financial crime investigators have seized 800 servers and arrested two men in a crackdown on hosting companies that provided infrastructure for Russian state-sponsored cyberattacks across Europe. items.title: Payroll startup Remote says it grew revenue 50% per employee without adding headcount
items.summary: Payroll service provider Remote recently surpassed $300 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR) and became cash-flow positive, thanks to a 50% increase in revenue per employee resulting from AI adoption.

items.summary: After using multiple security cameras over the years, I've found the best arrangement for my home - but that doesn't make it right for everyone.
